occurrence_sentence: QuEra and UK-based collaborators announced that they will build one of the UK's quantum testbeds.

interaction_phrase: will be built by QuEra in collaboration with UK-based collaborators
occurrence_sentence: Funded through the NQCC, and supported by the Small Business Research Initiative (SBRI) framework, one of the testbeds will be built by QuEra in collaboration with UK-based collaborators.
Funded through the NQCC, and supported by the Small Business Research Initiative (SBRI) framework, one of the testbeds will be built by QuEra in collaboration with UK-based collaborators.

interaction_phrase: NQCC seeks to accelerate the development of the UK's quantum computing capabilities
occurrence_sentence: NQCC seeks to accelerate the development of the UK's quantum computing capabilities and infrastructure.

interaction_phrase: fulfilling the UK national quantum computing strategy
occurrence_sentence: This deployment will accelerate the cross-pollination between companies in the UK/EU quantum ecosystem, help develop the UK quantum workforce, set new performance standards, and make key advances towards fulfilling the UK national quantum computing strategy.
